tasks.label: PIO Upload OTA (auto detect env)
args: import configparser, re, subprocess, pathlib, sys; p=pathlib.Path('platformio.ini'); cp=configparser.ConfigParser(); cp.read(p); envs=[s.split(':',1)[1] for s in cp.sections() if s.startswith('env:')]; matches=[e for e in envs if re.search(r'(^|[-_])ota$', e, re.I)]; env=matches[0] if matches else None; print('OTA env:', env if env else 'NOT FOUND'); sys.exit(2) if env is None else subprocess.check_call(['platformio','run','--target','upload','--environment',env])
